creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Visiting The Most Underrated Park in NYC

How to get there: Take the A train🚆to 190th Street, take the elevator up, and you’ll walk right into Fort Tryon Park

#nyc #NewYork #travel #hiddengem #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Today I want to take you to the most underrated park in New York City that only the locals know about. You'll take the A train all the way to 190th street, ride this elevator, walk outside, take these steps past the giant roundabout and into a park that has the largest heath and heather garden in the country, the entryway of a gilded age mansion you can walk through, a stunning terrace with Hudson River views, an overlook of the George Washington Bridge, and the Met Cloisters where you'll teleport into the medieval realms surrounded by European gardens. This is Fort Tryon Park.
